metaDesc: Landela ixesha leTestamente eNdala, ubomi bukaYesu, nohambo lukaPawulos kwimephu yokwenene — iBhayibhile yenzeka kwiindawo zokwenene.

s.title: IBhayibhile ngeMephu
s.verse: “Ngokuya sasinixelela ngamandla eNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu nangokuza kwayo, sasinganenzeli ntsomi emini. Isihomo nesithozela sayo sasibona ngala wethu amehlo.” (2 Petros 1:16)
s.purpose: IBhayibhile asiyontsomi. Yingxelo yabantu abahamba kwiindawo, imihla, namagama okwenene. Landela ezo ndlela kwimephu, ngokulandelelana kwexesha — cofa indawo, okanye ucofe ▶ ukuze uhambe kuyo inyathelo nganye.
s.ot_lead: Asingohambo olunye kodwa kukuqukuqela kwembali yosindiso ukususela ekudalweni: ukudala nokuwa → unogumbe neBabele → ukubizwa (uAbraham) → ilizwe lesithembiso → uMphambili → entlango → uloyiso → ubukumkani → ukwahlulwa → ukuthinjwa → ukubuya.
s.je_lead: Landela ubomi bukaYesu njengoko iiVangeli zibulandisa, ngokulandelelana — ukususela ekuzalweni kwakhe eBhetelehem kudlula ubhaptizo lwakhe nobulungiseleli baseGalili, kuwele iSamariya, kuye emnqamlezweni, ukuvuka nokunyukela eYerusalem.
s.pa_h: Ukususela eAntiyokwe kuse eziphelweni zomhlaba — iRoma
s.pa_lead: Ukususela ePentekoste eYerusalem, indlela iindaba ezilungileyo ezanwenwa ngayo ngaphaya kweYuda — kudlula iAsia eNcinci neYurophu kuse entliziyweni yobukhosi. Khetha olunye lohambo oluhlanu (olwesi-1·olwesi-2·olwesi-3 + uhambo oluya eRoma + emva kokukhululwa) ulandele iziganeko zeZenzo neeleta ezabhalwa endleleni.
s.foot: Imithombo · Iindawo zilandela isibhalo seBhayibhile nejografi eqhelekileyo yeBhayibhile (namagama anamhlanje apho enceda). Imida yolwandle, imilambo namachibi zizotywe ngedatha yejografi evulekileyo (Natural Earth), zenziwe lula.

eden.name: I-Eden (Ukudala · Ukuwa)
eden.note: Ehlabathini elalenziwe “lalilungile kakhulu,” isono siyangena siqhawule unxibelelwano phakathi kukaThixo nabantu.
events: Isithembiso sokuqala seVangeli — “inzala yomfazi iya kuyicumza intloko yenyoka”

noah.name: I-Ararati (uNogumbe)
noah.note: UThixo ugweba ihlabathi elizele sisono, kodwa ulondoloza ubomi ngosapho olunye.
events: Umnqophiso womnyama — “akusayi kubuya kubekho nogumbe wokutshabalalisa”

babel.name: INqaba yaseBabele
babel.note: Ngokuchasene nekratshi elifikelela ezulwini, uThixo uphithanisa ulwimi lwabo abasasaze abantu emhlabeni.

ur.name: I-Uri
ur.note: Ibali leBhayibhile losindiso liqala ngokubizwa kwendoda enye.
events: UThixo ubiza uAbram aphume e-Uri lwamaKaledi
“Ndiya kukwenza isizwe esikhulu… zonke izizwe zothamsanqeliswa ngawe”

haran.name: IHaran
events: UAbram usuka esiya eKanan eneminyaka engama-75

shechem.name: IShekem · iKanan
shechem.note: Elizweni lesithembiso kusekwa usapho, umnqophiso udlulela kwizizukulwana.
events: Ukungena eKanan, isibingelelo sokuqala — “ndiya kulinika inzala yakho eli lizwe”
Oonyana abalishumi elinambini bakaYakobi — ingcambu yezizwe ezilishumi elinambini

egypt.name: IYiputa (iGoshen)
egypt.note: Usapho luba sisizwe esikhulu — luze lube sisizwe samakhoboka.
events: Usapho lonke lukaYakobi luhlela phantsi ukubalekela indlala

sinai.name: INtaba iSinayi
sinai.note: Olona sindiso lukhulu lweTestamente eNdala — amakhoboka aba ngabantu bakaThixo ngokwabo.

kadesh.name: IKadeshi (intlango)
kadesh.note: Ukungakholwa kubiza isizukulwana ilizwe — kanti uThixo uhlala nabo.
events: Iintlola ezilishumi elinambini — kanti abantu bayala ukukholwa
Iminyaka engama-38 entlango — imana, ilifu nomlilo

shiloh.name: IShilo (abaGwebi)
shiloh.note: Kungekho kumkani, umntu ngamnye wenza unothanda — kufuneka ukumkani wokwenene.
events: URute — ukuthembeka kwimihla emnyama, kumnombo kaDavide

jerusalem.name: IYerusalem · UBukumkani obuManyeneyo
jerusalem.note: Ixesha eliqaqambileyo likaSirayeli — nesithembiso sokumkani ongunaphakade.
events: USawule ukumkani wokuqala, aze uDavide noGoliyati
Umnqophiso kaDavide — “itrone yakho iya kuhlala ngonaphakade” (2 Samuweli 7)

samaria.name: ISamariya · UBukumkani obuMahluleyo
samaria.note: Ubukumkani buyahlulwa buhle njengoko abaprofeti bekhala.
events: Emva koSolomon, ukwahlulwa kube nguYuda noSirayeli
UEliya, uIsaya, uYeremiya bekhala besithi ‘buyani’ — bexela uMesiya

nineveh.name: INineve (i-Asiriya)
nineveh.note: Ngokungazikhathaleli zonke izilumkiso, umntla uwa kuqala.

babylon.name: IBabheli
babylon.note: Olona xesha limnyama ngaphezu kwawo onke — kanti isithembiso sokubuyiselwa sisekhona.

susa.name: ISusa (iPersi)
susa.note: Nasentliziyweni yobukhosi babahedeni, uThixo uyabagcina abantu bakhe.
events: UNehemiya uthandaza phambi kokumkani aze athunywe

return.name: Ukubuyela eYerusalem
return.note: Bayabuya bakhe kwakhona — kodwa akukho kumkani ofikileyo. Balindele uMesiya.
events: Amaza amathathu okubuya ngommiselo kaKoreshi (uZerubhabheli 538 · uEzra 458 · uNehemiya 444)
Itempile iyakhiwa kwakhona neendonga zaseYerusalem ziyabuyiselwa
UMalaki — iTestamente eNdala iyavalwa: “Ndiyasithuma isigidimi sam”

bethlehem.name: IBhetelehem
bethlehem.note: UMesiya owathenjiswa uza kwidolophu kaDavide — uLizwi waba yinyama.

nazareth.name: INazarete
events: Eneminyaka elishumi elinambini, ebuza ephendula etempileni

jordan.name: UMlambo iYordan
jordan.note: Ubulungiseleli bakhe basesidlangalaleni buyaqala — izulu liyambeka njengoNyana.
events: UMoya wehla njengehobe — “Lo nguNyana wam endimthandayo”

cana.name: IKana
cana.note: Kumqondiso wakhe wokuqala utyhila uzuko lwakhe.
events: Amanzi enziwa iwayini — umqondiso wakhe wokuqala

sychar.name: ISikare (iSamariya)
sychar.note: Indlela yobulungiseleli bokuqala — kudlula eYerusalem kuse eSamariya edelelekileyo.

capernaum.name: IKapernahum
capernaum.note: Isiseko sobulungiseleli baseGalili — ukubiza, ukufundisa nokuphikiswa konke kuhlangana apha.

galilee.name: ULwandle lwaseGalili
galilee.note: Ngamandla phezu kwendalo ubonisa ukuba ungubani.
events: Usuthisa abangama-5 000 ngezonka ezihlanu neentlanzi ezimbini

caesarea_p.name: IKesariya Filipi
caesarea_p.note: Abafundi bayaqonda ukuba unguKrestu, ize indlela yomnqamlezo ivuleke.

bethany.name: IBhethani
bethany.note: Ubonisa amandla phezu kokufa kusihlwa sangaphambi kweveki yakhe yokugqibela.

jerusalem.name: IYerusalem
jerusalem.note: Incopho yonke iBhayibhile ekalathela kuyo — umnqamlezo, uvuko, ukunyukela.
events: Ukungena ngoloyiso; uphinda abhukuqe iitafile zetempile
Uvuka ngomhla wesithathu, aze anyukele ezulwini

antioch.name: IAntiyokwe
antioch.note: Ibandla elithumayo apho ubulungiseleli beentlanga buqala buze bubuyele khona.
events: Ibandla apho amakholwa aqala ukubizwa ngokuba ‘ngamaKrestu’
Indawo yokuphuma kohambo lokuqala, olwesibini nolwesithathu

paphos.name: IPafos
paphos.note: Amandla abonakaliswa kwabo baphikisa iindaba ezilungileyo.

perga.name: IPega
perga.note: Izibuko lasePamfiliya — apha uYohane Marko ubuyela umva.

iconium.name: I-Ikoniyo
iconium.note: Abaninzi bayakholwa, kodwa intshutshiso ibanyanzela ukuqhubeka.

lystra.name: IListra
events: Exulutywe ngamatye washiywa kungathi ufile, uyavuka

derbe.name: IDerbe
derbe.note: Kwenziwa abafundi abaninzi; baphinda amanyathelo abo ukomeleza amabandla.

troas.name: ITrowa
troas.note: Inqaku lotshintsho apho iindaba ezilungileyo ziqala ukubheka eYurophu.

philippi.name: IFilipi
philippi.note: Ibandla lokuqala laseYurophu — iindaba ezilungileyo ziyoyisa nasentolongweni.
events: Iingoma phakathi kobusuku, inyikima, usapho lomgcini-ntolongo lusindisiwe

corinth.name: IKorinte
corinth.note: Uhlala unyaka nesiqingatha, etyala ibandla kwisixeko esinobubi.

ephesus.name: I-Efese
ephesus.note: Intliziyo yohambo lwesithathu — ilizwi linwenwa kuyo yonke iAsia.
events: Ukufundisa imihla ngemihla iminyaka emibini eholweni likaTiranus

miletus.name: IMileto
events: Amadoda amakhulu ayalila, esazi ukuba akasayi kuphinda ambone

caesarea.name: IKesariya
caesarea.note: Iminyaka emibini ukhusela iindaba ezilungileyo phambi koorhuluneli nokumkani.

jerusalem.name: IYerusalem
jerusalem.note: Ubanjwa etempileni, indlela yakhe njengebanjwa iyaqala.
events: Njengommi waseRoma, uthunyelwa phantsi kwabalindi eKesariya

crete.name: IKrete
crete.note: Emva kokukhululwa kwakhe, isiqithi apho ashiya khona uTito ukuze acwangcise amabandla.
events: Ushiya uTito ukuze amisele amadoda amakhulu kuzo zonke iidolophu

malta.name: IMelita
malta.note: Kudlula isaqhwithi nokuphukela komkhombe, isithembiso sikaThixo siyema.
events: Umoya ‘wasemntla-mpuma’ uphahlaza umkhombe, kodwa bonke abangama-276 bayasinda

rome.name: IRoma
rome.note: Ekugqibeleni iindaba ezilungileyo zifikelela entliziyweni yobukhosi — asisiso isiphelo kodwa sisiqalo.
events: Iminyaka emibini egadiwe endlwini, evakalisa ubukumkani ngesibindi
Kamva uphinda avalelwe, ubhala u-2 Timoti aze abulawelwe ukholo — “Ndikulwile ukulwa okulungileyo, ndilufezile ugqatso”
